mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flow_attachment ( flow_apply_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, oss_key, uploaded_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{flowApplyId}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{ossKey}, #{uploadedBy}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO flow_attachment (flow_apply_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, oss_key, uploaded_by, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.flowApplyId}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.fileUrl}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.fileType}, #{item.ossKey}, #{item.uploadedBy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, flow_apply_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, oss_key, uploaded_by, created_at FROM flow_attachment WHERE flow_apply_id = #{flowApplyId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, flow_apply_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, oss_key, uploaded_by, created_at FROM flow_attachment WHERE id = #{id}
